spec.description: Per-device drill-down view. Select a single device to inspect CPU, memory, uptime, and per-interface traffic, errors, and packet stats.

spec.title: Polling Status
spec.description: SNMP polling status. 1 = active, 0 = inactive.

spec.title: Process Count
spec.description: Total number of running processes via procNum.

spec.title: CPU Time Breakdown
spec.description: Per-core CPU time split into user, system, and idle components.

spec.title: Memory Active
spec.description: Active real and virtual memory over time.

spec.title: Active Connections
spec.description: Current active firewall connections via fwNumConn.

spec.title: Active Connections Over Time
spec.description: Active and peak concurrent firewall connections over time.

spec.title: Connection Disposition
spec.description: Accepted, dropped, and rejected connection counts from the firewall.

spec.title: Traffic In
spec.description: Inbound traffic rate per interface (ifHCInOctets). Top 25 interfaces. Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Traffic Out
spec.description: Outbound traffic rate per interface (ifHCOutOctets). Top 25 interfaces. Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Errors In
spec.description: Inbound error rate per interface (ifInErrors). Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Errors Out
spec.description: Outbound error rate per interface (ifOutErrors). Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Drops In
spec.description: Inbound discards and unknown protocol drops per interface (ifInDiscards, ifInUnknownProtos). Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

defaults.noValue: No discard data reported by device

spec.title: Drops Out
spec.description: Outbound discards per interface (ifOutDiscards). Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Unicast In
spec.description: Inbound unicast packet count per interface (ifHCInUcastPkts). Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Broadcast In
spec.description: Inbound broadcast packet count per interface (ifHCInBroadcastPkts). Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Multicast In
spec.description: Inbound multicast packet count per interface (ifHCInMulticastPkts). Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Unicast Out
spec.description: Outbound unicast packet count per interface (ifHCOutUcastPkts). Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Broadcast Out
spec.description: Outbound broadcast packet count per interface (ifHCOutBroadcastPkts). Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Multicast Out
spec.description: Outbound multicast packet count per interface (ifHCOutMulticastPkts). Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Sensor Counts by Type
spec.description: Count of hardware sensors reporting via ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB (entSensorValue). N/A = MIB not polled.

spec.title: Total Hardware Sensors
spec.description: Count of all hardware sensors reporting via SNMP for this device.

spec.title: Non-OK Sensors
spec.description: Count of sensors with status other than 'ok' (unavailable or nonoperational). Any value > 0 is a problem.

spec.title: Other Sensor Data
spec.description: Sensors reporting a measurement type not covered by a defined enumeration (other) from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB.

spec.title: Unknown Sensor Data
spec.description: Sensors with unknown or arbitrary relative measurements (unknown) from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB.

spec.title: AC Voltage Sensor Data
spec.description: AC voltage sensors (voltsAC) from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB.

spec.title: Volts
spec.description: Voltage sensor readings from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB (kentik_snmp_entSensorValue, type: voltsAC/voltsDC). Multiple sensors may appear per device.

spec.title: Amps
spec.description: Current (amperes) sensor readings from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB (kentik_snmp_entSensorValue, type: amperes). Not all devices report current sensors.

spec.title: Power Sensor Data
spec.description: Power sensors (watts) from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB.

spec.title: Frequency Sensor Data
spec.description: Frequency sensors (hertz) from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB.

spec.title: Temperature Sensor Data
spec.description: Temperature sensor readings in Celsius from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB (kentik_snmp_entSensorValue). Values above vendor thresholds indicate cooling issues.

spec.title: Relative Humidity Sensor Data
spec.description: Percent relative humidity sensors (percentRH) from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB.

spec.title: Fan Speed Sensor Data
spec.description: Shaft RPM sensors (rpm) from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB.

spec.title: Airflow Sensor Data
spec.description: Airflow sensors in cubic meters per minute (cmm) from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB.

spec.title: Truth Value
spec.description: Boolean truth-value sensor readings from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB (kentik_snmp_entSensorValue, type: truthValue). Typically indicates fault or alarm conditions.

spec.title: Special Enum Sensor Data
spec.description: User-defined enumerated value sensors (specialEnum) from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB.

spec.title: dBm
spec.description: Optical signal power in dBm from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB (kentik_snmp_entSensorValue, type: dBm). Low or very negative values indicate signal loss on optical interfaces.

spec.title: FRU Fan Trays
spec.description: Fan tray operational status. Value: 1=unknown, 2=up, 3=down, 4=warning.

spec.title: FRU Modules
spec.description: Module operational status. Value: 1=ok, 2=disabled, 6=failed, 7=missing, 14=poweredDown, 15=poweredUp.

spec.title: Power Supply Redundancy
spec.description: Power supply redundancy state per entity from CISCO-ENTITY-FRU-CONTROL-MIB. All groups should show redundant.

spec.title: Interface Status
spec.description: Interface counts by admin/oper state. Oper Down > 0 warrants investigation. Admin-down interfaces are excluded by default (`monitor_admin_shut: false` in snmp-base.yaml); set to `true` to include them in counts.

spec.title: Interface Status Δ 24h
spec.description: Absolute change vs 24h ago. Zero indicates no change or data unavailable for that window.

spec.title: All Sensor Data
spec.description: Current sensor readings from ENTITY-SENSOR-MIB (entSensorValue). Shows all sensor types with their live value, scale, and type.

spec.title: IPSLA RTT Operations
spec.description: Current state of all IP SLA RTT operations — completion time, oper state, last sense code, timeouts, and threshold violations.

spec.expression: SELECT A.rtt_operation_type AS "Op Type", A.rtt_echo_source_address AS "Source IP", A.rtt_echo_target_ip AS "Target IP", A.__value__ AS "RTT (ms)", B.rtt_operation_oper_state AS "Oper State", C.rtt_operation_sense AS "Sense", D.rtt_operation_timed_out AS "Timed Out", E.rtt_operation_threshold_violated AS "Threshold Violated" FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.device_name = B.device_name AND A.`Index` = B.`Index` LEFT JOIN C ON A.device_name = C.device_name AND A.`Index` = C.`Index` LEFT JOIN D ON A.device_name = D.device_name AND A.`Index` = D.`Index` LEFT JOIN E ON A.device_name = E.device_name AND A.`Index` = E.`Index` WHERE A.device_name != '__no_ipsla__' LIMIT 100

spec.title: Active MIBs
spec.description:
Active series per MIB and table — shows which protocols drive this device's billable series footprint in Grafana Cloud.

**To reduce series count (ktranslate `snmp-base.yaml`):**

• **`global.mibs_enabled`** — the primary control. Remove any MIB from this list to stop polling it across all devices. Scope to a single table using `MIB-NAME.tableName` syntax (e.g. `HOST-RESOURCES-MIB.hrProcessorTable`) to avoid pulling the full MIB.

• **`match_attributes`** — regex-based allowlist applied before shipping data. Use at the device or global level to restrict which interfaces or metrics are collected (e.g. keep only `^Ten.*|^Gig.*` interfaces).

• **`flow_only: true`** — disables all SNMP polling for a device; use when you only need flow data from that device.

See: https://github.com/kentik/ktranslate/wiki/Advanced-Ktranslate-Configuration

spec.expression: SELECT mib_name AS MIB, mib_table AS `Table`, avg(__value__) AS Series FROM A GROUP BY mib_name, mib_table ORDER BY Series DESC LIMIT 100

spec.title: Collection Age
spec.description: Seconds since last successful ping and SNMP collection. Green < 2 min, yellow < 5 min, red = stale.

spec.title: Series by Poll Interval
spec.description: Active series by poll cadence (seconds). Series count is the same regardless of interval — but faster polling increases DPM (data points per minute), which can affect Grafana Cloud billing in higher usage tiers.

spec.title: Polling Health
spec.description: SNMP polling health for this device. Red = BAD with reason shown. Green = healthy. Only shows reason stat when device is unhealthy.

spec.title: Total Series
spec.description: Active Prometheus series for this device right now. In Grafana Cloud, each unique metric name + label set = one billable active series. This is this device's direct contribution to your active series total.

spec.title: Polling Health History
spec.description: History of polling health state transitions — green=GOOD, red=BAD. Gaps indicate no data collected.

spec.title: Polling Health — Bad Events
spec.description: Each data point where PollingHealth=BAD within the selected time range. Each row = one scrape interval where polling failed.

spec.title: Memory Free
spec.description: Current free memory in bytes.

spec.title: Memory Total
spec.description: Total physical memory capacity (MemoryTotal).

spec.title: Error % In
spec.description: Per-interface inbound error percentage (ifInErrorPercent). Rate of errored frames as % of total in-frames. Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Error % Out
spec.description: Per-interface outbound error percentage (ifOutErrorPercent). Rate of errored frames as % of total out-frames. Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Utilization In
spec.description: Inbound bandwidth utilization % per interface (IfInUtilization). Only calculated for interfaces with a Speed value set in SNMP. Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Utilization Out
spec.description: Outbound bandwidth utilization % per interface (IfOutUtilization). Only calculated for interfaces with a Speed value set in SNMP. Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Total Connections
spec.description: Current total connections (established + half-open + half-closed + passthrough + optimized).

spec.title: Established Connections
spec.description: Fully established connections right now.

spec.title: Half-Open / Half-Closed
spec.description: Connections in transitional TCP states. Elevated counts can indicate network issues or port scans.

spec.title: Optimized / Passthrough
spec.description: WAN-optimized vs passthrough connections. High passthrough may indicate optimization policy gaps.

spec.title: Connection States Over Time
spec.description: All connection state counters over time. Spikes in half-open/half-closed can indicate instability.

spec.title: Non-Full OSPF Neighbors
spec.description: Count of OSPF neighbors not in Full state (state < 8). Any value > 0 indicates an adjacency problem.

spec.title: OSPF Neighbor Events Over Time
spec.description: Rate of OSPF neighbor state transitions. Spikes indicate adjacency flapping.

spec.title: OSPF Neighbor Status
spec.description: Current OSPF neighbor adjacency state, event count, and retransmission queue per neighbor. State 8 = Full (healthy).

spec.expression: SELECT A.neighbor_ip AS "Neighbor IP", A.neighbor_id AS "Router ID", A.ospfNbrState AS "State", B.__value__ AS "Events", C.__value__ AS "LS RetransQ" FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.neighbor_ip = B.neighbor_ip LEFT JOIN C ON A.neighbor_ip = C.neighbor_ip WHERE A.neighbor_ip != '__no_ospf__' ORDER BY A.neighbor_ip LIMIT 200

spec.title: Queue Drops In
spec.description: Per-interface IOS input queue drop rate (cieIfInputQueueDrops). Distinct from ifInDiscards — these are drops at the IOS input queue level. Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Queue Drops Out
spec.description: Per-interface IOS output queue drop rate (cieIfOutputQueueDrops). Distinct from ifOutDiscards — these are drops at the IOS output queue level. Use `match_attributes` in snmp-base.yaml to filter which interfaces ktranslate collects (e.g. `if_interface_name: "^Ten.*|^Gig.*"`), reducing series at the source.

spec.title: Non-OK Temperature Sensors
spec.description: Count of temperature sensors reporting a non-normal state. Any value > 0 warrants investigation.

spec.title: Temperature Over Time
spec.description: Temperature readings per sensor over time (CISCO-ENVMON-MIB). Rising trends approaching threshold values indicate cooling issues.

spec.title: Temperature Sensor Data
spec.description: Current temperature reading and state per sensor (CISCO-ENVMON-MIB). State: 1=normal, 2=warning, 3=critical, 4=shutdown.

spec.expression: SELECT A.temp_descr AS "Sensor", A.entity_name AS "Entity", A.entity_class AS "Class", A.__value__ AS "Temp (°C)", A.temp_threshold AS "Threshold (°C)", B.temp_state AS "State" FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.`Index` = B.`Index` WHERE A.temp_descr != '__no_temp__' ORDER BY A.temp_descr LIMIT 200

spec.title: Total Drawn Current
spec.description: Maximum total current drawn across all modules (cefcTotalDrawnCurrent, milliamps).

spec.title: FRU Current Draw Over Time
spec.description: Total drawn vs available current per chassis module (milliamps). Drawn approaching Available indicates power budget risk.

spec.title: FRU Current per Module
spec.description: Per-FRU current draw (cefcFRUCurrent, milliamps) from CISCO-ENTITY-FRU-CONTROL-MIB.

spec.title: Fan Speed % Over Time
spec.description: Fan speed as percentage of maximum rated speed (cefcFanSpeedPercent). Sustained high values may indicate airflow restriction.

spec.title: Current Fan Speeds
spec.description: Current fan RPM and speed percentage per fan module (cefcFanSpeed / cefcFanSpeedPercent). Only available on Nexus devices.

spec.expression: SELECT A.entity_name AS "Component", A.entity_description AS "Description", A.__value__ AS "Speed (RPM)", B.__value__ AS "Speed (%)" FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.entity_name = B.entity_name WHERE A.entity_name != '__no_fan__' ORDER BY A.entity_name LIMIT 100

spec.title: Stack Member Count
spec.description: Number of active stack members (cswSwitchState). Should match expected stack size.

spec.title: Stack Switch & Port States
spec.description: Catalyst stack switch and port states. cswSwitchState: 1=ready, 2=progressing, 3=added, 4=removed. cswStackPortOperStatus: 1=up, 2=down, 3=forcedDown.

spec.title: HSRP Active Groups
spec.description: Count of HSRP groups currently in Active state (cHsrpGrpStandbyState == 6). Should match expected active group count.

spec.title: HSRP Group States
spec.description: HSRP group states per interface and group ID. State: 1=initial, 2=learn, 3=listen, 4=speak, 5=standby, 6=active.

spec.title: Non-OK Fans
spec.description: Count of fans not in normal state (CISCO-ENVMON-MIB). Normal = state 1. Any value > 0 warrants investigation.

spec.title: Fan States
spec.description: Current fan and power supply sensor states from CISCO-ENVMON-MIB. State: 1=normal, 2=warning, 3=critical, 4=shutdown, 5=notPresent.

spec.title: Non-OK PSUs
spec.description: Count of power supplies not in normal state (CISCO-ENVMON-MIB). Normal = state 1. Any value > 0 warrants investigation.

spec.title: Power Supply States
spec.description: Current power supply sensor states from CISCO-ENVMON-MIB. State: 1=normal, 2=warning, 3=critical, 4=shutdown, 5=notPresent.

spec.title: Temperature Sensor Data
spec.description: Current temperature reading and status per sensor from platform sensor MIB (SG/server hardware). Status: 1=normal, others indicate fault.

spec.expression: SELECT A.sensor_name AS "Sensor", A.__value__ AS "Temp (°C)", B.__value__ AS "Status" FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.Index = B.Index WHERE A.sensor_name != '__no_temp__' ORDER BY A.sensor_name LIMIT 100

spec.title: Flow Traffic over Time
spec.description: Flow data is exported by this device but may not be present in the selected time range. Widen the time range if panels appear empty.

spec.title: Flow Traffic by Protocol over Time
spec.description: Bytes in active flow conversations per protocol at each point in time. Peaks represent bursts of a specific protocol. Protocol breakdown is not available from SNMP interface counters.

spec.title: Total Flow Traffic by Protocol
spec.description: Peak bytes observed per protocol across flow conversations in the selected time range. Source: NetFlow/sFlow exported by this device.

spec.title: Top Local Addresses
spec.description: Top 20 local addresses (network_local_address) by total bytes in flow records reported by this device within the selected time range.

spec.title: Top Peer Addresses
spec.description: Top 20 peer addresses (network_peer_address) by total bytes in flow records reported by this device within the selected time range.

spec.title: Top Flow Conversations
spec.description: Top 25 local → peer address pairs ranked by total bytes from flow records. Flow conversation totals will not match SNMP interface byte counters — they measure different things.

spec.title: Flow Traffic by Conversation
spec.description: Top 10 conversations by total bytes from flow records. Source: NetFlow/sFlow exported by this device.

spec.title: Flow Traffic over Time
spec.description: Bytes in active flow conversations where this device's IPs are the local address (network_local_address). Widen the time range if the panel appears empty.

spec.title: Total Flow Traffic by Protocol
spec.description: Peak bytes observed per protocol in flow records where this device is the local address. Source: NetFlow/sFlow.

spec.title: Flow Traffic by Protocol over Time
spec.description: Bytes in active flow conversations by protocol where this device's IPs are the local address. Helps identify dominant protocols.

spec.title: Top Peer Addresses
spec.description: Top 20 peer addresses in flows where this device is the local address.

spec.title: Flow Traffic by Conversation
spec.description: Top 10 conversations by flow bytes where this device is the local address.

spec.title: Top Flow Conversations
spec.description: Top 25 local → peer conversations where this device appears as the local address.

spec.title: Flow Traffic over Time
spec.description: Bytes in active flow conversations where this device's IPs are the peer address (network_peer_address). Widen the time range if the panel appears empty.

spec.title: Total Flow Traffic by Protocol
spec.description: Peak bytes observed per protocol in flow records where this device is the peer address. Source: NetFlow/sFlow.

spec.title: Flow Traffic by Protocol over Time
spec.description: Bytes in active flow conversations by protocol where this device's IPs are the peer address. Helps identify dominant protocols.

spec.title: Top Local Addresses
spec.description: Top 20 local addresses in flows where this device is the peer address.

spec.title: Flow Traffic by Conversation
spec.description: Top 10 conversations by flow bytes where this device is the peer address.

spec.title: Top Flow Conversations
spec.description: Top 25 local → peer conversations where this device appears as the peer address.

spec.title: Interface IP Addresses & Flow Roles
spec.description: SNMP-discovered IP addresses (IF-MIB if_Address) that appear in flow records within the selected time range, annotated with their OTel flow role — Exporter (device_name), Local (network_local_address), or Peer (network_peer_address). IPs with no flow activity are hidden.

spec.expression: SELECT A.if_Address, A.if_AdminStatus, A.if_Description, A.if_Netmask, A.if_OperStatus, A.if_Alias, CASE WHEN B.device_name IS NOT NULL AND C.network_local_address IS NOT NULL AND D.network_peer_address IS NOT NULL THEN 'Exporter / Local / Peer' WHEN B.device_name IS NOT NULL AND C.network_local_address IS NOT NULL THEN 'Exporter / Local' WHEN B.device_name IS NOT NULL AND D.network_peer_address IS NOT NULL THEN 'Exporter / Peer' WHEN C.network_local_address IS NOT NULL AND D.network_peer_address IS NOT NULL THEN 'Local / Peer' WHEN B.device_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'Exporter' WHEN C.network_local_address IS NOT NULL THEN 'Local' WHEN D.network_peer_address IS NOT NULL THEN 'Peer' ELSE '' END AS flow_role FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.if_Address = B.device_name LEFT JOIN C ON A.if_Address = C.network_local_address LEFT JOIN D ON A.if_Address = D.network_peer_address WHERE (B.device_name IS NOT NULL OR C.network_local_address IS NOT NULL OR D.network_peer_address IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 200

spec.title: Total Interfaces Over Time
spec.description: Count of interfaces visible to ktranslate over time, filtered by the interface name selector.

spec.title: Interface Summary
spec.description: Per-interface status, metadata, and current traffic rate. Sorted by highest inbound. in_bps/out_bps are current rates in bits/sec.

spec.expression: SELECT A.if_interface_name AS Interface, MAX(A.if_Alias) AS Alias, MIN(A.if_OperStatus) AS "Oper Status", MAX(A.if_Speed) * 1 AS Speed, MAX(B.__value__) AS "In BPS (avg)", MAX(C.__value__) AS "Out BPS (avg)", MAX(E.__value__) AS "In Util % (latest)", MAX(F.__value__) AS "Out Util % (latest)" FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.if_interface_name = B.if_interface_name LEFT JOIN C ON A.if_interface_name = C.if_interface_name LEFT JOIN E ON A.if_interface_name = E.if_interface_name LEFT JOIN F ON A.if_interface_name = F.if_interface_name GROUP BY A.if_interface_name ORDER BY 6 DESC LIMIT 1000

spec.title: Interfaces with Operational State Changes
spec.description: Interfaces that had at least one OperStatus transition within the selected time range, sorted by number of state changes. Click an interface name to filter the view.

spec.title: State Changes Over Time
spec.description: Up/down state history for interfaces with at least one OperStatus transition in the selected time range. The table above counts transitions at 1-minute resolution using changes() over [$__range]; the timeline renders at the native scrape interval. When a state flip falls exactly at the edge of the time window, an interface may appear in one panel but not the other.

spec.title: Alert State History
spec.description: Historical alert state changes for this device

spec.title: Alerts Fired
spec.description: Number of times alerts transitioned to Alerting state for this device in the selected time range.

spec.title: Alerts Resolved
spec.description: Number of times alerts transitioned back to Normal state for this device in the selected time range.

spec.title: Active Alerts
spec.description: Currently firing or pending alerts for this device.

spec.title: Incomplete Polls (0 Interfaces)
spec.description: Count of SNMP polls that returned 0 interfaces in the selected time range. Spikes or clusters here often precede mass interface-down alerts.

spec.title: Polling Failures Over Time
spec.description: Overlay of zero-interface poll failures (orange) and alert firing/pending transitions (red). A poll failure appearing 5–25 min before a mass alert spike indicates the polling gap may have preceded or masked the real event.

spec.title: Ktranslate Logs
spec.description: All ktranslate log lines referencing this device. Filter by severity or keyword using the search bar.

spec.title: Memory Utilization
spec.description: Current memory utilization as a percentage of total memory (kentik_snmp_MemoryUtilization). Sustained high values indicate memory pressure.

spec.title: NTP Peer Status
spec.description: NTP peer configuration from CISCO-NTP-MIB. cntpPeersPeerName = peer IP, cntpPeersRefId = reference clock IP, Value = stratum level.

spec.expression: SELECT A.`Index` AS "Peer Index", A.__value__ AS "Stratum", B.__value__ AS "Ref ID" FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.`Index` = B.`Index` WHERE A.`Index` != '__no_ntp__' ORDER BY A.__value__ LIMIT 100

spec.title: Interface Summary
spec.description: Per-interface status, metadata, and current traffic rate. Sorted by highest inbound. in_bps/out_bps are current rates in bits/sec.

spec.expression: SELECT A.if_interface_name AS Interface, MAX(A.if_Alias) AS Alias, MIN(A.if_OperStatus) AS "Oper Status", MAX(A.if_Speed) * 1 AS Speed, MAX(B.__value__) AS "In BPS (avg)", MAX(C.__value__) AS "Out BPS (avg)", MAX(E.__value__) AS "In Util % (latest)", MAX(F.__value__) AS "Out Util % (latest)" FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.if_interface_name = B.if_interface_name LEFT JOIN C ON A.if_interface_name = C.if_interface_name LEFT JOIN E ON A.if_interface_name = E.if_interface_name LEFT JOIN F ON A.if_interface_name = F.if_interface_name GROUP BY A.if_interface_name ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000

spec.title: System Info
spec.description: Device identity: hostname, model, IP, OS platform, poll interval, and software description.

spec.expression:
SELECT 'Device Name' AS Field, COALESCE(SysName, 'N/A') AS Details FROM A
UNION ALL SELECT 'Model', COALESCE(tags_kentik_model, 'N/A') FROM A
UNION ALL SELECT 'IP Address', COALESCE(src_addr, 'N/A') FROM A
UNION ALL SELECT 'Profile', COALESCE(instrumentation_name, 'N/A') FROM A
UNION ALL SELECT 'Poll Interval', COALESCE(SysPollInterval, 'N/A') FROM A
UNION ALL SELECT 'Uptime', CONCAT(FLOOR(__value__ / 8640000), 'd ', FLOOR(__value__ / 100 % 86400 / 3600), 'h ', FLOOR(__value__ / 100 % 3600 / 60), 'm') FROM A
UNION ALL SELECT 'Description', COALESCE(SysDescr, 'N/A') FROM A
LIMIT 10

spec.title: Collection Age
spec.description: Absolute timestamp of the last successful SNMP and ping data point from ktranslate. For age-in-seconds with color thresholds, see the Collection Age panel.

spec.title: Ping Latency (current)
spec.description: Most recent avg RTT from ktranslate. To enable: set `response_time: true` (adds ping alongside SNMP) or `ping_only: true` (disables SNMP, ping only) in snmp-base.yaml. Override the default 1 pkt/sec rate with `ping_interval_sec`.

spec.title: Ping Latency
spec.description: ICMP ping RTT from ktranslate to the device. To enable: set `response_time: true` (adds ping alongside SNMP) or `ping_only: true` (disables SNMP, ping only) in snmp-base.yaml. Override the default 1 pkt/sec rate with `ping_interval_sec`.

spec.title: Ping Packet Loss
spec.description: ICMP ping packet loss percentage from ktranslate. To enable: set `response_time: true` (adds ping alongside SNMP) or `ping_only: true` (disables SNMP, ping only) in snmp-base.yaml. Override the default 1 pkt/sec rate with `ping_interval_sec`.

spec.title: Ping Packet Loss (current)
spec.description: Most recent packet loss % from ktranslate. To enable: set `response_time: true` (adds ping alongside SNMP) or `ping_only: true` (disables SNMP, ping only) in snmp-base.yaml. Override the default 1 pkt/sec rate with `ping_interval_sec`.

spec.title: Memory Utilization Over Time
spec.description: Memory utilization over time.

spec.title: Interface Status
spec.description: Interface counts by admin/oper state. Oper Down > 0 warrants investigation. Admin-down interfaces are excluded by default (`monitor_admin_shut: false` in snmp-base.yaml); set to `true` to include them in counts.

spec.title: Interface Status Δ 24h
spec.description: Absolute change vs 24h ago. Zero indicates no change or data unavailable for that window.

spec.title: Disk Usage
spec.description: Per-partition disk usage. Only populated for Linux-based devices (firewalls). Empty for Cisco devices.

spec.expression: SELECT A.disk_name AS "Partition", A.__value__ AS "Size", B.__value__ AS "Used", C.__value__ AS "Free", CASE WHEN A.__value__ > 0 THEN (B.__value__ / A.__value__) * 100.0 ELSE 0 END AS "Used %" FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.disk_name = B.disk_name LEFT JOIN C ON A.disk_name = C.disk_name WHERE A.disk_name != '__no_disk__' ORDER BY 5 DESC LIMIT 100

spec.title: Disk Utilization
spec.description: Per-partition used % over time. Only populated for Linux-based devices (firewalls).

spec.title: CPU Utilization
spec.description: Current CPU utilization averaged across all cores (kentik_snmp_CPU). Sustained values above 90% indicate saturation.

spec.title: CPU Utilization Over Time
spec.description: CPU utilization over time. Averaged across all CPU instances for this device.

spec.title: CPU Utilization
spec.description: Max core CPU usage via multiProcUsage. Red ≥ 90%, yellow ≥ 70%.

spec.title: CPU Utilization (per core)
spec.description: Per-core CPU usage via multiProcUsage. Available on Linux-based devices (firewalls).

spec.title: Polling Health
spec.description: SNMP polling health. 1 = healthy, 0 = unhealthy.

spec.title: 01. Network Device Details
